productDisplayName: Fossil Women Silver-Toned Dial Watch ES2421
description: Case style: Analogue watch with a stainless steel circular case, has a fixed bezel with stone-studded detail, stainless steel backDial style: Silver-toned dial, has hour, minutes and seconds hands, stone-studded markingsFeatures: Three subdials for day, date and hour displays, a screw to reset the time and functionsStrap style: Gold-toned bracelet-style strap, secured with a butterfly claspWater-resistant up to 100 mComes in an authentic Fossil collectible tinWarranty: 2 years international warranty from the date of purchase against manufacturing defects onlyWarranty provided by Brand Owner / Manufacturer
